positive: A symmetrical, stylized illustration of a glowing mystical compass embedded in a celestial map. The compass needle points to a stylized, ornate crescent moon and a three-pointed star. Background elements include delicate, interconnected constellations (Ursa Major, Orion) rendered in fine line art style, surrounded by soft nebula gradients of deep indigo, sapphire blue, and cosmic gold. The overall composition should feel balanced, ethereal, and mysterious. Vector art, minimalist yet complex, high contrast, clean silhouettes, symmetrical composition, graphic novel style, perfect for apparel print, centered.
negative: blurry, distorted, text, watermark, signature, logo, realistic photo, low detail, artifact, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noise, messy, asymmetrical, copyrighted characters
